title: A standout home for Chatelherault RC Club
description: This shell launch gives the club a polished foundation for meetup updates, event recaps, galleries, member builds, and partner networking.
panelBody: This is the production shell launch. Weekly posts, full galleries, and member build archives will be added during the content phase.

featureCards.title: Weekly Meetups
featureCards.description: Sunday details, weather status, and turnout notes will be updated by admins each week.

featureCards.title: Event Features
featureCards.description: Special crawls, collaborations, and standout recaps are structured and ready to publish.

featureCards.title: Member Builds
featureCards.description: Build stories, rig specs, and upgrade highlights will be added to a dedicated showcase.
